creator: kseniia.journey-london-rexby
caption:
Café to visit in London this festive season: Haute Dolci at The O2 🍬

Menu highlights include the delicious Strawberry Matilda Cake, Pistachio San Sebastián Cheesecake, chocolate fondue, and French Toffee Banana Toast. For brunch, enjoy waffles, shakshuka, açaí bowls, as well as a full English breakfast🥞

As for drinks, enjoy hot chocolate with marshmallows, milkshakes (such as Lotus Biscoff and Candy Shake), and a wide variety of mocktails ☕️

Treat yourself to the Pistachio and Chocolate covered Strawberries special💚🍓

Make sure to visit next time you are in North Greenwich when visiting The O2 arena before or after the show (venue also offers private dining for the events)🍫

📍Haute Dolci at The O2, 2B Peninsula Square, SE10 0DX @hautedolciattheo2
